encounters.trigger: Opening the gate releases the second wave

pickup.name: Magma Core
pickup.effect: Allows wielder to absorb heat energy

encounters.trigger: Destroying the sentinel shatters the bridge to the throne
Defeating the Wraith unlocks the boss arena

boss.name: Ignis the World Burner
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ancient Sun Key to destabilize the boss's core shielding

level.objective: Extinguish the volcanic core to prevent a continental eruption

level.setting: The Magma Core of Mount Ignis

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker collapses the bridge, opening the path to the Boiling Cavern.
Shattering the Golem triggers an earthquake that unseals the Forbidden Crater.
Driving away the Scavenger draws the boss out from the central lava vent.

boss.name: Pyroclastic Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Use the Eternal Ice Fragment to cool the Overlord's heart, rendering it vulnerable to a final blast.

level.objective: Extinguish the heart of the volcano to prevent a global catastrophe.

enemy.name: Magma Stalker
enemy.weakness: Radiant damage from the Blessed Radiant Claymore

encounters.hazard: Lava geysers erupting from the floor
encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker collapses the bridge, revealing a path to the lower vents.

enemy.name: Obsidian Sentinel
enemy.weakness: Frost damage from the Frozen Catalyst

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Sentinel grants access to the core control room.

enemy.name: Inferno Zealot
enemy.weakness: Heat-dampening field created by the Ember-Shield Aegis

encounters.trigger: Obtaining the Ancient Core Key triggers a lockdown that forces the player into the Final Forge.

boss.name: Ignis the World-Burner
boss.weakness: The Frozen Catalyst combined with the Ember-Shield Aegis
boss.victory_condition: Extinguish the boss's internal flame heart.

level.objective: Deactivate the volcanic stabilizers to stop the continent-wide eruption.
level.reward: The Title of Flame Warden and a legendary armor upgrade.

level.setting: The Ash-Choked Cinders, a desolate wasteland of active lava rivers and crumbling basalt pillars.

encounters.hazard: Lava jets that erupt periodically from fissures.

pickup.name: Frost-Infused Core
pickup.effect: Allows temporary cooling of high-temperature enemies.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel cracks the foundation, leading to the Ash Pits.

encounters.hazard: Toxic sulfur gas clouds that reduce visibility.

pickup.name: Molten Anchor
pickup.effect: Increases strike weight against fortified armor.

encounters.trigger: The husk dies and collapses into a chasm, revealing the path to the Core Chamber.

encounters.hazard: Falling debris from the destabilizing ceiling.

pickup.name: Primal Igneous Essence
pickup.effect: Essential component to extinguish the boss's inner fire.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Golem triggers the activation of the final boss's core.

boss.name: Ignis the Eternal
boss.victory_condition: Use the Essence to stabilize the boss's core before dealing the final blow with the Greataxe.

level.objective: Traverse the volcanic wastes and extinguish the eternal flame of the volcano guardian.
level.reward: The legendary Ember-Splitter armor set and the ability to traverse lava without damage.

level.setting: The Smoldering Archives of Ignis, a cavernous library built over a magma flow where ancient heat-resistant scrolls hum with mysterious energy.

pickup.name: Thermal Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Reduces incoming fire damage by half.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Golem causes a bridge of hardened obsidian to rise, leading to the library's core.

encounters.hazard: Thick, blinding ash clouds that limit vision.

pickup.name: Cryo-Catalyst Vial
pickup.effect: Allows the player to freeze metallic surfaces instantly.

encounters.trigger: Slaying the bat reveals a hidden lever that unlocks the gate to the inner sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Falling molten droplets from the ceiling.

pickup.name: Ancient Ignition Key
pickup.effect: Used to power down the final security system protecting the boss.

encounters.trigger: Eliminating the Sentinel allows the player to insert the ignition key, revealing the throne room.

boss.name: The Architect of Embers
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ancient Ignition Key to overload the boss's internal steam core.

level.objective: Retrieve the Chronos Scroll from the heart of the volcano before the eruption collapses the library.

level.setting: An eerie, subterranean obsidian cavern filled with glowing rivers of lava and ghostly wisps of ash.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Ash Stalker triggers the collapse of the stone bridge leading to the inner chamber.

encounters.hazard: Toxic sulfur gas clouds reducing visibility
encounters.trigger: Shattering the Magma Construct opens the heavy basalt gate into the caldera.
The death of the Cinder Wraith ignites the final seal for the boss arena.

boss.name: Pyroclastic Sovereign
boss.victory_condition: Use the Void Crystal to shatter the Sovereign's mantle and land the final strike.

level.objective: Traverse the volcanic heart and defeat the Pyroclastic Sovereign to stabilize the dormant mountain.
level.reward: Storm-caller's Mantle and permanent electrical infusion.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the slime unlocks the passage to the Obsidian Oven.
The turtle retreats, revealing the path to the Boiling Crater.
The dragonling flees, leading the way to the Heart of the Mountain.

boss.name: Ignis the Gluttonous Sloth
boss.victory_condition: Calm the beast using the Ancient Volcano Whistle to share a snack

level.objective: Pacify the volcano guardians to prevent the marshmallows from burning

level.setting: The Silent Caldera, where lava flows like liquid silk under a violet sky.

pickup.name: Frozen Ember
pickup.effect: Slows time in a small radius

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker unlocks the path to the Boiling Basin.
Cooling the Golem reveals the bridge to the Central Spire.
Destroying the Sentinel grants the heart required to awaken the Ancient Phoenix.

boss.name: Ancient Phoenix
boss.victory_condition: Use the Heart of the Volcano to stabilize the Phoenix's flames and purify the caldera.

level.objective: Restore the flow of time within the volcanic sanctuary.
level.reward: Chronos Mantle: Increases agility and cooldown reduction.

encounters.hazard: Gale force winds pushing towards the edge

pickup.name: Essence of Dawn
pickup.effect: Enhances weapon strikes to bypass divine armor

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker opens the path to the Sunlit Courtyard

encounters.hazard: Blinding light flares that reduce accuracy

pickup.name: Star-Forged Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the seal on the Celestial Altar

encounters.trigger: Using the key unlocks the gate to the Altar's sanctum

pickup.name: Crystalline Focus
pickup.effect: Harmonizes with celestial energies to weaken void beings

encounters.trigger: Clearing the observatory reveals the hidden path to the boss arena

boss.name: Astral Sovereign
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Focus to dissipate the Sovereign's form

level.objective: Restore balance to the celestial heavens

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel activates the bridge, leading to the Pulsar Chamber

pickup.name: Frozen Time Shard
pickup.effect: Allows the player to bypass the boss's phase shift

encounters.trigger: Absorbing the Weaver's essence unlocks the stairway to the Zenith Apex
Shattering the Wraith dissipates the forcefield protecting the Grand Orrery

boss.name: Entropy Sovereign
boss.victory_condition: Restoring the universal clock using the Celestial Key

level.objective: Prevent the collapse of the timeline by defeating the Entropy Sovereign
level.reward: The Chronos Mantle, granting immunity to temporal aging

level.setting: The Abyssal Observatory, a floating citadel drifting in the void between stars

encounters.hazard: Gravitational rifts that pull the player toward spikes
encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel opens the path to the Pulsar Corridor

pickup.name: Chronos Shard
pickup.effect: Slows time for all non-player entities

encounters.trigger: The Wraith's death shatters the barrier to the Supernova Sanctum

pickup.name: Celestial Keystone
pickup.effect: Unlocks the boss chamber containment field

encounters.trigger: Using the Keystone activates the altar leading to the boss

boss.name: Entropy Sovereign
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Keystone to absorb the Sovereign's core

level.objective: Purge the darkness infecting the celestial heart of the galaxy
level.reward: The mantle of the Star Weaver and ascension to the void throne

level.setting: a drifting archipelago of star-dusted floating islands

pickup.name: Stardust Shard
pickup.effect: adds a radiant glow to light-based spells

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sprite reveals a shimmering pathway leading to the Sun-Kissed Spire.

pickup.name: Gravity Anchor
pickup.effect: prevents being pushed by celestial currents

encounters.trigger: The Moth drops a crystalline key upon defeat that unlocks the gate to the Void Observatory.

encounters.hazard: shifting platforms that tilt towards the void
encounters.trigger: Clearing the Shadow Constellation clears the dense fog blocking the path to the Celestial Throne.

boss.name: Nebula Weaver
boss.victory_condition: Use the Essence of Clarity to expose the Weaver's true core and strike it with the Prismatic Mirror Wand.

level.objective: Restore balance to the celestial archipelago by calming the Nebula Weaver.
level.reward: The title of Arch-Illusionist and control over the constellations.

level.setting: A crumbling nebula temple floating in the void

encounters.hazard: Gravity wells that pull the player toward the edge
encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel causes the bridge to collapse into the next chamber

encounters.hazard: Random solar flares that scorch the floor

pickup.name: Frozen Comet Core
pickup.effect: Allows the player to freeze molten materials

encounters.trigger: The wraith's death releases a shockwave that opens the sanctum gates

encounters.hazard: Rotating lightning pillars that deal rapid damage
encounters.trigger: Securing the key stabilizes the rift leading to the final encounter

boss.name: Cosmic Devourer
boss.victory_condition: Use the core to solidify the Devourer's ethereal form, then finish with the staff

level.objective: Prevent the collapse of the celestial fabric

level.setting: The Shattered Astral Plane, a desolate void of floating debris and dying stars

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker unlocks the gravity bridge to the Comet Fields
Destroying the Sentinel reveals the portal to the Lunar Sanctum
Exorcising the Wraith grants access to the Throne of Stars

boss.name: Grand Supernova Architect
boss.victory_condition: Infuse the bow with the Essence of Light and land a critical shot

level.objective: Restore the celestial equilibrium by defeating the Architect

level.setting: An abandoned orbital cathedral drifting in the void of a dying nebula

pickup.name: Resonance Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Vibrates in the presence of celestial energy

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Wraith stabilizes the floor, unlocking the path to the Observation Spire

pickup.name: Condensed Star-Heart
pickup.effect: Can overload machinery with raw fusion energy

encounters.trigger: The Sentinel's collapse triggers the activation of the central gravity lift to the Empyrean Core
The Horror's essence clears the forcefield protecting the boss arena entrance

boss.name: The Eclipse Architect
boss.victory_condition: Overload the Architect's central nexus using the Star-Heart while its shield is down

level.objective: Decommission the celestial engine before it collapses the entire nebula
level.reward: The Architect's blueprint for gravity manipulation technology

level.setting: an orbital station drifting near a dying nebula

pickup.name: Coolant canister
pickup.effect: freezes internal components of robotic foes

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the drone opens the blast doors to the engine room
Clearing the maintenance bots triggers the emergency lift to the bridge

pickup.name: Phase Core
pickup.effect: disrupts shields of massive cosmic entities

encounters.trigger: Disabling the firewall activates the main navigation console, signaling the boss

boss.name: Nebula Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Stabilize the nebula core before the station loses structural integrity

level.objective: Repair the orbital station navigation systems
level.reward: The ability to pilot the station to safety
